title: Bocchi's hair
description: hitori Gotou's hair from Bocchi the rock
body:
![Bocchi's hair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c3262c1ccfb8a78ff237a512eedd514aac100a.png)

How to Bocchi's hair:
carve or obtain a Carved Pumpkin .
Rename the sword to `Bocchis hair` using an anvil.

</details>

### Requirements
you no longer need OptiFine or CIT Resewn or any other replacements
